prompt: Create an ultra-detailed retro Japanese anime portrait inspired by classic 1980s cel animation and city-pop aesthetics. Depict a young woman with porcelain skin, expressive warm brown anime eyes, a short feathered black bob with wispy bangs, and soft coral lips. She wears vibrant coral-red wired over-ear headphones and a relaxed white cotton button-up shirt. Her head is slightly turned as if listening deeply to music, with a calm, reflective expression. Illuminate the scene using dramatic golden-hour sunlight from one side balanced by cool blue ambient skylight, creating cinematic shadows and warm facial highlights. Place her against a simple gradient sky-blue background. Render with authentic vintage cel animation linework, smooth painted shading, subtle film grain, soft bloom, nostalgic color grading, and ultra-high-resolution remastered anime quality.
promptEn: Create an ultra-detailed retro Japanese anime portrait inspired by classic 1980s cel animation and city-pop aesthetics. Depict a young woman with porcelain skin, expressive warm brown anime eyes, a short feathered black bob with wispy bangs, and soft coral lips. She wears vibrant coral-red wired over-ear headphones and a relaxed white cotton button-up shirt. Her head is slightly turned as if listening deeply to music, with a calm, reflective expression. Illuminate the scene using dramatic golden-hour sunlight from one side balanced by cool blue ambient skylight, creating cinematic shadows and warm facial highlights. Place her against a simple gradient sky-blue background. Render with authentic vintage cel animation linework, smooth painted shading, subtle film grain, soft bloom, nostalgic color grading, and ultra-high-resolution remastered anime quality.
promptZh: 创作一幅超精细的复古日本动漫肖像，灵感源自 1980 年代经典的赛璐珞动画与 City Pop 美学。描绘一位 皮肤白皙、拥有富有表现力的暖棕色动漫眼睛、留着黑色羽毛剪短发并带有轻薄刘海、涂着柔和珊瑚色唇膏的年轻女性。她佩戴着 鲜艳的珊瑚红色有线头戴式耳机，身穿宽松的白色棉质衬衫。她微微转头，仿佛正沉浸在音乐中，表情平静而深思。场景采用戏剧性的黄金时刻阳光从一侧照射，并与冷蓝色的环境天光平衡，营造出电影般的阴影和温暖的面部高光。背景为简洁的渐变天蓝色。渲染效果需具备地道的复古赛璐珞动画线条、平滑的涂抹阴影、细腻的胶片颗粒感、柔和的光晕、怀旧的色彩分级，以及超高清重制版的动漫画质。
